description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn. The structure features large windows on multiple sides, allowing ample natural light into the spacious, open-plan interior. The main living area is visually divided into a lounge with a colorful rug, a dining area with a long table, and a kitchen space, all with wooden flooring. The exterior walls are predominantly white, and the roof is flat, giving the building a modern, minimalist appearance. There are multiple entry points, including a prominent front entrance and side doors, as well as a small, enclosed room that could serve as a utility or storage area. The interior is furnished with chairs, tables, and shelving, and the overall design emphasizes openness and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, flat roof, and open-plan interior featuring lounge, dining, and kitchen areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the open-plan living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows and the spacious interior layout with visible furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance and more windows, with the open-plan space visible inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the main living area, and a small enclosed room on the left.
